creator: dudleyi@yahoo.com
text:
The page https://www.freebsd.org/platforms/amd64/ references the "AMD64 Architecture Programmer’s Manual Volumes 1–5" but provides a link that is broken. Clicking the link results in a 404 error and redirects users to a generic search landing page on AMD's site.

Steps to Reproduce

1. Navigate to https://www.freebsd.org/platforms/amd64/.
2. Locate the reference to the "AMD64 Architecture Programmer’s Manual Volumes 1–5".
3. Click the provided link (currently pointing to https://www.amd.com/system/files/TechDocs/40332.pdf).

Actual Results

1. Clicking the link results in a 404 Error response from AMD's internal web server.
2. The user is redirected to https://www.amd.com/en/search/documentation/hub.html, a generic library search landing page.

Expected Results

1. The link should correctly direct users to the manual's new location: https://www.amd.com/content/dam/amd/en/documents/processor-tech-docs/programmer-references/40332.pdf.
2. Users should be able to access the intended document without encountering errors or needing additional navigation.

Build Date & Hardware

1. Issue encountered on FreeBSD website as of December 30, 2024.
2. This issue is specific to the FreeBSD website and is platform-independent. All environments tested (Windows & FreeBSD) experience the same issue.
